title: papaver somniferum
intro: Papaver somniferum, also known as the opium poppy, is a flowering plant native to Asia and the Mediterranean region. The plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, such as morphine and codeine, which have been used to relieve pain, reduce coughing, and induce sleep. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of insomnia, coughs, and pain, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Papaver somniferum is often harvested for its dried latex, which is used to create various herbal preparations, including tinctures, extracts, and ointments.
